front.title: A metal puzzle box
front.description: A 6" cube of dull gray metal, covered in hinges, knobs, dials, sliders, levers, and the like. A thing of mad genius, resisting all attempts to open it by brute force.

list.description: To unlock its mysteries, you must…
… roll +INT to open the box: on a 10+, it takes a few days of fiddling; on a 7-9, it takes a few obsessive weeks; on a 6-, it's beyond you.
… spend a season deciphering the symbols etched along the inside.
… risk never being able to decipher the symbols, and/or developing some mental quirk as you do so.
… commune with a primordial spirit and learn the Silent Words from it.
… spend a few weeks practicing the spell, risking all sorts of harm and collateral damage.

back.title: Runes of Creation
back.description:
When you carefully inscribe an object with the runes of creation, pick 1 desired effect:

  • It will flow into any shape you imagine
  • It will become indestructible
  • It will become beautiful
  • It will blaze with terrible heat (1d10 damage, messy), if only for a moment

When you speak the Silent Word that completes the spell (far range), mark a debility as elemental forces flow through you into the object. The effect works, but roll +CON: on a 10+, the GM picks 1; on a 7-9, the GM picks 2; on a 6-, all 3:

  • Mark another debility & lose 1d10 HP
  • The elements run amok, triggering a fire/earthquake/avalanche/storm/etc.
  • The effect lasts only while you focus on it, and then the object is damaged in a manner of the GM's choosing

move.name: When you carefully inscribe an object with the runes of creation
move.description: Pick 1 effect: the object flows into any shape; becomes indestructible; becomes beautiful; or blazes with terrible heat (1d10 damage, messy). Then speak the Silent Word (far range), mark a debility, and roll +CON: on a 10+, GM picks 1; on a 7-9, GM picks 2; on a 6-, all 3: mark another debility & lose 1d10 HP; elements run amok; effect lasts only while you focus.
